MarketSnapshot.title: Market Snapshot
MarketSnapshot.description: Daily quantitative snapshot of global market indices and commodities.

date.description: ISO date string for the snapshot.

isComplete.description: Whether the snapshot generation is finished.

assetCount.description: Total number of assets in this snapshot.

Asset.title: Asset Data
Asset.description: Historical metrics and risk data for a single asset.

/snapshots/{date}.description: Stores metadata for a daily snapshot.

/snapshots/{date}/assets/{assetSymbol}.description: Stores detailed data for a specific asset within a snapshot.
